assertion_results.text: Step 2.3.5 dependency chain context identifies criterion as a dev-only dependency based on its presence in [dev-dependencies] in the manifest
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md states: 'criterion is declared in `[dev-dependencies]` in the Cargo.toml manifest' and the dependency chain output shows 'Profile: dev-only ([dev-dependencies] in backend/Cargo.toml)' and 'NOT present in production builds -- used for benchmarks only'. Manifest evidence confirms '[dev-dependencies] criterion = "0.5.1"'.

assertion_results.text: The dependency scope decision tree classifies criterion as 'dev-only — not shipped in production' and applies the dev-dependency remediation handling
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md includes a 'Dependency Scope Decision Tree' section with 'Classification: dev-only dependency -- used for benchmarks only, NOT shipped in production builds' and specifies remediation handling: add dev-dependency label, override priority to Normal, include dev/build-only note.

assertion_results.text: Remediation tasks include the dev-dependency label in the labels array: labels contain 'dev-dependency' alongside 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', and the CVE ID
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md shows Labels: '["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-99001", "dev-dependency"]' for both the upstream backport task and the downstream propagation subtask.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task priority is set to Normal regardless of the CVE severity (CVSS 5.3 Medium) — the priority override is applied per the decision tree
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md shows 'Priority: Normal' for both tasks and states 'Priority is set to **Normal** (overriding CVE severity of CVSS 5.3 Medium)' in the dev-dependency handling section.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task description includes a note indicating the dependency is dev/build-only and not shipped in production
assertion_results.evidence: Both task descriptions in remediation.md include: 'This dependency is dev/build-only and is not shipped in production. Remediation priority is Normal (supply chain risk only).' The upstream task also states in Implementation Notes: 'Dependency scope: dev-only -- criterion is declared in [dev-dependencies] and is NOT shipped in production builds. Used for benchmarks only.'
